title: Blink
bodyHtml:
Unhappy with the dim lighting in his barn, Farmer John has just installed a fancy new chandelier consisting of N (3 <= N <= 16) lights bulbs arranged in a circle. The cows are fascinated by this new light fixture, and enjoy playing the following game: at time T, they toggle the state of each light bulb if its neighbor to the left was turned on at time T-1. They continue this game for B units of time (1 <= B <= 10^15). Note that B might be too large to fit into a standard 32-bit integer. Given the initial states of the light bulbs, please determine their final states after B units of time have elapsed.

Unhappy with the dim lighting in his barn, Farmer John has just installed a fancy new chandelier consisting of N (3 <= N <= 16) lights bulbs arranged in a circle.    The cows are fascinated by this new light fixture, and enjoy playing the following game: at time T, they toggle the state of each light bulb if its neighbor to the left was turned on at time T-1.  They continue this game for B units of time (1 <= B <= 10^15).  Note that B might be too large to fit into a standard 32-bit integer.  Given the initial states of the light bulbs, please determine their final states after B units of time have elapsed.
